programme.title: Irresistible
programme.desc: When objects start to go missing from her home, Sophie Hartley (Susan Sarandon) suspects that a stalker is responsible. Then she meets Mara (Emily Blunt), the new co-worker of her husband, Craig (Sam Neill), and after seeing her in a dress that was among the vanished items, Sophie believes that Mara is obsessed with her. Unfortunately, she takes her suspicions too far, which leads to legal ramifications and her husband becoming concerned for her well-being -- but also to a startling discovery.

programme.title: The Family Holiday
programme.desc: A thirty-something pool hustler stands to receive a ten-million dollar inheritance if he can prove he's forsaken his street days and settled down with a family.

programme.title: Employee of the Month
programme.desc: David is having a bad day. He's fired from his dream job, his fiancée dumps him and he gets involved in a string of bank robberies. Stars Matt Dillon, Christina Applegate and Steve Zahn.

programme.title: Rush of Fear
programme.desc: Rosanna Arquette and Chris Potter star as couple Alex and Jack, who are away on a romantic weekend to try to salvage their broken marriage. Their trip turns into a nightmare when Jack is kidnapped.

programme.title: Animal Factory [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: Suburbanite Ron (Edward Furlong) is spoiled, young and not overly worried about the marijuana charges leveled against him. But, after being made out to be a drug dealer, he faces a five-year jail sentence in San Quentin State Prison. Physically frail and unaccustomed to his rough surroundings, Ron is primed to fall victim to sexual predators and bullying guards -- that is, until he's befriended by Earl (Willem Dafoe), a veteran inmate who finds meaning in protecting the vulnerable new kid.

programme.title: Agent Red [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: Captain Matt Hendricks and Dr. Linda Christian are locked in a submarine with Russian terrorists that threaten to launch a chemical virus on US territory.

programme.title: K-19: The Widowmaker
programme.desc: Follows Captain Alexei Vostrikov who, at the height of the Cold War, is ordered to take over command of the nuclear missile submarine K-19, pride of the Soviet Navy. His assignment: Prepare the K-19 for sea and take her out on patrol -- no matter what the cost. But problems with the K-19 arise that may lead to a core meltdown and explosion that will certainly kill all aboard, and possibly trigger a nuclear war. Vostrikov must choose between his orders and the lives of his men.

programme.title: Avalanche (1999)
programme.desc: The survivor of an Alaskan avalanche, Dr. Lia Freeman (Caroleen Feeney) is an environmentalist concerned about a similar disaster occurring if a proposed new oil pipeline is built. Freeman adamantly warns the planners of the likelihood of a major avalanche, but they ignore her pleas. As she realizes that a massive whiteout is imminent, Freeman tries to get the citizens of a nearby town to leave, aided by brave helicopter pilot Neal Meekin (Thomas Ian Griffith).

programme.title: Transsiberian
programme.desc: On their way home from China, married Christian missionaries Roy (Woody Harrelson) and Jessie (Emily Mortimer) take a train from Beijing to Moscow. On board, they befriend Carlos (Eduardo Noriega) and Abby (Kate Mara). When Roy does not return in time at one stop, Jessie waits for him to catch up at the next station. Carlos and Abby stay with her, insisting the town is unsafe, however Carlos' attempts to "befriend" Jessie radically change the dynamic of the trip.

programme.title: Conseils d'amour
programme.desc: Une modeste rédactrice de conseils amoureux découvre que son journaliste préféré est un admirateur du balado pour lequel elle travaille.

programme.title: Cuisine, amour, Londres
programme.desc: Lorsque tout ce que Stella croyait acquis s'effondre, elle accepte un poste de chef dans un nouveau restaurant londonien.

programme.title: Dans la peau d'un tueur
programme.desc: Un auteur de romans policiers est soupçonné par une étudiante diplômée d'être à l'origine d'un meurtre horrible sur le campus universitaire.

programme.title: Dans la tête d'un serial killer
programme.desc: L'animatrice d'une baladodiffusion consacrée au crime s'efforce de rester discrète malgré le succès de son enquête sur un tueur en série.

programme.title: Amour au glaçage royal
programme.desc: Emma, pâtissière à New York, est engagée pour la fête d'anniversaire du roi et de la reine de Sanovia.

programme.title: The Harder They Fall
programme.desc: Humphrey Bogart's final screen appearance as a cynical sportswriter involved in the boxing racket.

programme.title: Oliver!
programme.desc: Charles Dickens classic tale of a waif in 19th Century England comes alive in this musical.

programme.title: Don't Raise The Bridge, Lower The River
programme.desc: A schemer hatches a plan to convert a swinging Chinese discotheque back into his wife's ancestral home.

programme.title: Lonesome Dove
programme.desc: Jake's (Robert Urich) involvement with the Suggs gang reaches a tragic climax Gus reunites with an old flame (Anjelica Huston).

programme.title: Lonesome Dove
programme.desc: Gus (Robert Duvall) is injured during an Indian attack Call (Tommy Lee Jones) has a final run-in with Blue Duck.

programme.title: Jesus of Nazareth
programme.desc: After Joseph and Mary's betrothal, Mary is visited by the angel Gabriel, who tells her she will bear the Son of God Mary and Joseph travel to Bethlehem to take part in Herod's census, where Jesus is born.

programme.title: John McEnroe: In the Realm of Perfection
programme.desc: Though John McEnroe was the No. 1 tennis player of his day, he never won the French Open.

programme.title: The Other F Word
programme.desc: This documentary asks what happens when anti-authoritarian punk rockers become dads.

programme.title: No Impact Man
programme.desc: An environmentalist and his family attempt to make as little environmental impact as possible for one year.

programme.title: Age of Audio
programme.desc: The resurgence of audio storytelling. From a vivid passion to an extraordinary billion dollar industry.

programme.title: Maestra
programme.desc: Five women participate in 'La Maestra', the only competition in the world for female orchestra conductors.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.3
programme.desc: Back in her hometown, Mi Young is shocked to learn she's pregnant—and her mother finds out, too. Lee Gun heads to Mi Young's mom's ssambap restaurant with President Park. Yong plays a video of Lee Gun and Mi Young—found on Gun's USB—for Chairwoman Wang, but her unexpected reaction throws him off. Meanwhile, Mi Young goes alone to the OB-GYN clinic, where she meets Daniel.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.4
programme.desc: Disheartened after repeated failures to find his sister, Daniel is in a slump. Through Chief Tak, Gun learns about a mysterious stimulant. Mi Young moves into Gun's lavish home, but finds herself caught between Gun's coldness and the chairwoman's kindness.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.5
programme.desc: Startled by Gun's sudden chill after the wedding, Mi Young is taken aback when he even presents divorce papers. To steady him, Chairwoman Wang recommends a prenatal class for Mi Young, and Gun reluctantly attends. Meanwhile, Gun bumps into Daniel and Mi Young at the chairwoman's house.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.6
programme.desc: Outside the prenatal class, Gun and Mi Young run into one of Se Ra's friends, while Se Ra decides to return to Korea after her New York performance. Hearing that an industrial-waste plant is slated for Yeo-ul Island, Mi Young feels betrayed by Gun, and her sudden change in attitude starts to irk him.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.7
programme.desc: Gun grows uneasy about Daniel's presence, and Mi Young tries to keep her distance from Gun. Mi Ja arrives in Seoul with Mr. Choi and goes out with Mi Young upon hearing Gun sold the Yeo-ul Island factory, she's furious. Meanwhile, Gun suggests that he and Mi Young start sharing a room.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.8
programme.desc: Gun shows Mi Young around his office, but Se Ra's unexpected arrival flusters him. He tries to tell Se Ra about his marriage, but Mi Young stops him.

programme.title: My ID is GangNam Beauty Ep.4

programme.title: My ID is GangNam Beauty Ep.6

programme.title: New Recruit Ep.6
programme.desc: With the arrival of the elite new recruit Cha Byeong-ho, Park Min-seok's status takes a pitiful, miserable plunge. Seizing the opportunity to redeem himself, Park targets the upcoming counter-infiltration drill. When a suspicious intruder suddenly appears before him, Park Min-seok throws himself into a desperate struggle to make the catch.

programme.title: New Recruit Ep.7
programme.desc: A transfer order is issued to Park Min-seok. Will he follow his father's demands and move to another unit? Or will he choose to stay and complete his service without further trouble? Meanwhile, the new villain, Seong Yun-mo, puts Kang Chan-seok in jeopardy with a formal grievance letter. In a fit of rage, Chan-seok directs his explosive anger toward the innocent Dong-woo...

programme.title: New Recruit Ep.8
programme.desc: The company has fallen into utter chaos. To bring the situation under control, the officers implement a series of MOS (Military Occupational Specialty) reassignments. This leads to a major crisis for the 1st Squad! Is the new soldier being traded for the ace, Cha Byeong-ho, really Seong Yun-mo?! Late at night, while searching for Yun-mo who disappeared during night watch, Sang-hoon is overcome by an ominous feeling.

programme.title: New Recruit Ep.9
programme.desc: Seong Yun-mo sets a dangerous plan in motion to get sent to the Green Camp! As his scheme unfolds exactly as calculated, the company spirals further into chaos. A long, desperate struggle ensues as the members of the company fight to overcome the looming crisis.

programme.title: New Recruit Ep.10
programme.desc: The conclusion of the "silent war" between the members of the 1st Squad, who are determined to bring Seong Yun-mo to justice, and Seong Yun-mo himself, who is desperate to be sent to Green Camp.

programme.title: New Recruit Season.2 Ep.1
programme.desc: A new company commander has arrived at the 2nd Company! Park Min-seok, who is gradually evolving into a proper Private First Class by managing his successors in his own clumsy way, enjoys peaceful days with his fellow soldiers—but for how long? Meanwhile, Kang Chan-seok, whose life has become a living hell after being targeted by seniors with gang ties, feels as though a breaking point is fast approaching.

programme.title: New Recruit Season.2 Ep.2
programme.desc: Unable to endure the abuse any longer, Kang Chan-seok finally snaps and causes a major incident. Desperate to return to his original unit, he recklessly confronts the 2nd Company Commander, begging for a transfer back. After reviewing the string of incidents that have plagued the 2nd Company, the commander takes matters into his own hands to tighten the lax discipline. His first move? A face-to-face sit-down with the military royalty, Park Min-seok.

programme.title: New Recruit Season.2 Ep.3
programme.desc: After making a secret deal with the Company Commander, Kang Chan-seok returns to the same barracks as Kim Dong-woo, leaving everyone in utter shock. Meanwhile, the Commander reviews the company's unrealistic "Elite Warrior" statistics and decides to personally oversee the selection process to weed out the frauds. Starting now, all personnel who haven't earned the "Elite Warrior" title are restricted from taking leave?!

programme.title: New Recruit Season.2 Ep.4
programme.desc: The members of the 3rd Squad are holding a "welcome back" party for Kang Chan-seok. The festive mood is short-lived, however, when the youngest recruit accidentally spills ramen broth all over Chan-seok while cleaning up. As everyone freezes in terror, remembering his notorious past as a "demon senior," Chan-seok defies expectations by simply laughing it off. With everyone still feeling uneasy, they head into CBRN and obstacle training—only to find the 2nd Company Commander standing there as the lead instructor.

programme.title: New Recruit Season.2 Ep.5
programme.desc: The grueling CBRN and obstacle training has finally begun. Under the commander's ruthless leadership, a string of dropouts occurs as harsh weather conditions push the soldiers to their breaking point. To make matters worse, the instructor waiting for those who fell behind during the drills... is Min-seok's own sister?! Just as Min-seok barely manages to finish the exercises and catches his breath, he realizes the gas regulator is missing from his rifle. The ordeal never ends—if he doesn't find that regulator, he's headed straight for the stockade.

programme.title: Blow-Up and Cool Down
programme.desc: Lou and Lyndah reclaim a riding mower from a housewife and her grab-happy husband. Then, Sonia and Matt head out on a scorcher of an afternoon for a repossession. Will they be able to beat both the heat and a pair of geriatric debtors? And, Sonia and Lyndah are left without words when they see the dark and embarrassing secret held in the backseat of a debtor's unpaid vehicle.

programme.title: Call for Help
programme.desc: With the pressure of Froy's legal problems mounting, the team does everything they can to convince him to hire a lawyer. Froy and Matt confront a misogynist frat boy with a dark secret, Sonia and Froy wrangle with a squadron of costumed rally racers, and Lou, Matt, and Froy get the surprise of a lifetime when they're faced with a truck-full of vicious gangsters.

programme.title: Missed Dates
programme.desc: First, Lyndah is put in a tough situation - she has to control a sobbing, cop-calling debtor and turn away Frankie's unwanted and inappropriate advances - all at the same time. Then, Matt and Froy have two problems on their hands, when they decide to haul away both a stripped-down husk of a car and the phone number of its owner's coquettish and bathrobe-wearing ex-girlfriend. Finally, Lou, Froy, and Lyndah head way out into the country to wrangle with a case of mistaken identity and a trio of shotgun-wielding cultists.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: After we meet the team members of Operation Repo, Matt, Lou, and Froy get interrupted by a bike riding gangster while trying to hook up a car. And later, Matt, Sonia, and Froy deal with an ecstatic and energetic young debtor who will not let go of her car.

programme.title: Involuntary Voluntary
programme.desc: Lou and Matt inadvertently become pawns in an elaborate and misguided lesson perpetrated by a cheating husband upon his mistress. Then, Matt and Lou attempt to take a vehicle away from a debtor who is so drunk he doesn't remember agreeing to give his car away voluntarily. And, Froy and Sonia try to take a limousine away from its shotgun-wielding driver and his two suspiciously-dressed passengers.

programme.title: Revenge Gone Wrong
programme.desc: When Matt almost gets run down by a posse of graffiti-packing gangsters, he sets into motion a plan of revenge against Lyndah.

programme.title: The Final Shot
programme.desc: On this no-holds-barred season finale, Matt and Lou have their final confrontation and the team loses a member. Sonia and Lyndah head out with Ashley to repossess a hang-glider in what might turn out to be the last job the three do together, Matt, Sonia, and Lyndah confront a team of shady astronomers who don't want to give up their van, and when Froy, Matt, and Sonia take on a risky job on the bad side of town, bullets fly, and the life of one of the team hangs in the balance.

programme.title: Broken Tooth Lou and Bad Breath Frankie
programme.desc: First, Froy and Lyndah probably need to schedule a trip to the dentist after Lou's tooth gets knocked out in the course of a tense confrontation with two irate debtors. Then, Frankie seriously blows a routine voluntary repo when the owner smells something on his breath. With Lou racing to the scene, is this the end of the road for the new guy? Then, Lou's problems get even worse when a rampaging construction crew employs an excavator to demolish the target Camry - with Froy inside of it.

programme.title: This Is No Fantasy
programme.desc: First, Froy and Lyndah get a tip from a spotter that leads them to a late model sedan with cans tied to the bumper and an angry bride in the passenger side. Next, Matt has to step in when Froy starts to lose it with a group of fantasy football players. And finally, Sonia, Lyndah, Froy, and Lou are astounded when a loopy debtor douses his own car in gasoline and sends it up in flames.

programme.title: Cement Mixer
programme.desc: Down in Texas, Matt and Froy are staking out a cement mixer, but their repo turns disastrous when an innocent bystander gets showered in concrete. In LA, Frankie takes the reins with an alcoholic debtor, and Lou and Sonia deal with a diva who pushes Sonia to her breaking point.

programme.title: Pepper Spray and Guns
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia douse a couple with a dose of pepper spray when the debtor gets too pushy with Sonia. Next, Matt and Froy battle biker girls when going after a motorcycle. And Finally, Matt and Froy confront a couple of delinquents in attempt to repo the couple's car, but they are soon sent running when the couple pushes back with guns.

programme.title: Froy Gets Beat Up
programme.desc: Sonia and Lou see the signs of the bad economy first-hand when a rich couple willing give up their late-model Landcruiser. Then, Matt and Sonia need to contend with a spoiled princess whose daddy forgot to pay the bill on her Jetta.

programme.desc: Lou and Sonia try to repossess a car from a yuppie with a flair for the arts and for mayhem, Sonia, Matt, and Froy reclaim some unusual equipment from an overgrown hippie with some long hair and a short temper, and Matt and Sonia interrupt a house party to ask for a vehicle, but soon find themselves fighting for their lives against a troupe of enraged fire dancers.

programme.title: Journey Within S01 E01
programme.desc: In this episode, we explore Zunya, an eco-village, and its enchanting blue zone concept. We delve into communal living, uncovering its allure. At La Senda, we experience soul cleansing Temazcal and a sublime cacao ceremony. We engage in a farm-to-table activity, savouring locally sourced ingredients. Cala Luna offers a rejuvenating body treatment amidst serene surroundings. We encounter the Maleku Tribes, witnessing their dance ceremony and visiting their cacao farm. The journey concludes with a breath taking hike and a majestic volcano view, reminding us of nature's beauty. This episode is a transformative adventure of self-discovery, cultural immersion, and connection with nature.

programme.title: Travel Man S09 E04

programme.title: Local Knowledge
programme.desc: As part of this year's Star brite Sea Safe event, we hit the water to experience some of the incredible fishing the Indian River Lagoon has to offer. For Rush, that meant some serious bow time with close friend Alex Hughey - on the hunt for some of the biggest snook we've ever encountered. The bite wasn't easy, but that didn't stop Rush from smashing his personal best - not once, but twice - in one unforgettable day on the water. Don't miss this action-packed episode of the Sea Safe adventure from beautiful Sebastian, Florida!

programme.title: Dirt
programme.sub-title: DIRT - "The ULTIMATE Ireland Food Road Trip | Surfing, Golfing & Delicious Eats
programme.desc: For DIRT's first trip across the pond, host Josh Rosen dove head first into Ireland. From long-held traditions to the modern-day artisanal movement, he unearthed the multicultural goldmine between the highlands and the Wild Atlantic Way—with stops for surfing, a seaweed bath, and a couple holes of golf spectated by free-range goats, of course. Foraged cocktails? Fresh crabs from Galway Bay? It's all on the table in this episode rooted in community, homegrown ingredients, and the damn good people who bring it all together. Subscribe to our YouTube channel to catch up on all of DIRT's past adventures.

programme.title: Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.sub-title: Hard Truths of Conservation - "The hunting heritage of South Africa
programme.desc: South Africa offers an incredible insight into the hunter and gatherer history of ancestors. Dan Cabela re-traces the footsteps of humanity's forefathers and explores how modern, private ownership of land has helped re-balance the human relationship with nature.

programme.title: Epic Funny Video Countdown
programme.desc: We're counting down the 100 funniest videos of all time. Hope you're ready, because each one is EPIC!

programme.title: Andy Woodhull
programme.desc: Andy recently appeared on Conan on TBS. Around that same time, his half-hour special premiered on Comedy Central. He was the first comedian to make his network television debut on “The Tonight Show starring Jimmy Fallon”. He also appeared on Comics Unleashed with Byron Allen, and Gotham Comedy Live on AXS. He had also appeared on Comedy Central's “Live at Gotham” in 2009.

programme.title: Cory Michaelis
programme.desc: A teacher by day and comic by night, Cory Michaelis keeps his act edgy enough to keep the audience from feeling like they're in his 10th grade History class. He cleverly tells short stories and jokes that try to get audiences to think but are silly and absurd as well. Cory is a regular in all of the clubs in the Pacific Northwest and has headlined clubs, colleges, casinos, and weird bars all over the country. He didn't win the 2013 World Series of Comedy (semi-finals), the 2012 Seattle International Comedy Competition (SICC), or the 2014 Tacoma Comedy Contest (2nd) but he took another crack at the SICC and made the 2014 finals.

programme.title: Kristin Key
programme.desc: Kristin Key grew up a minister's daughter in a small town in West Texas. Much like Footloose, she was raised in a no-drinking, no-dancing, no instrumental music environment. She seemed like any other well-behaved girl… until she opened her mouth. It was obvious from the beginning that she had a quick wit and undeniable sense of humor.

programme.title: Tommy Drake
programme.desc: Tommy's unique mixture of original material delivered in a classic style has given him the opportunity to do more shows and be seen by more people live than just about any other comic on the planet.

programme.title: Chad Thornsberry
programme.desc: Chad Thornsberry was born in St. Louis, MO. From an early age he learned his family was blessed, and blessed him with humor, quick wit, and a love of storytelling. Chad's unique comedic perspective awards audience the opportunity to laugh at the common occurrences in everyday life. Often referred to as a great writer, his straightforward style allows audiences to laugh with him and at him as they find the humor in themselves. With reflections on growing up in a trailer park and observations as an English teacher, Chad's satiric insights look at the pitfalls that make us human. With smart humor and a conversational style, Chad has delighted audiences from the trailer park, throughout the Midwest, and from coast to coast.

programme.title: Ron Ruhman
programme.desc: Ron has been called a “High Energy Seinfeld”. He brings a very energetic style to the stage as he shares his interesting slant on day-to-day life in an act that is clean, smart, and very entertaining.

programme.title: Byron Trimble
programme.sub-title: Diary of a Short City Boy
programme.desc: Byron Trimble has traveled around the world doing comedy for conferences, churches, retreats, clubs, schools, and corporate events. He has been featured on NBC, ABC, Living Oklahoma, and the Dan Patrick Show. His hilarious blend of music and comedy in his live shows and the following generated by his online videos have enabled him to share the stage with nationally known comedians like John Crist and Anita Renfroe. Raised in Detroit, MI, he now lives in Tulsa, OK with his beautiful wife, Hannah, and three young children. Yet, he says his greatest success might be being a pastors kid his whole life and never being arrested.

programme.title: Doug Thompson
programme.desc: With a different look on the everyday life, and the ability to find positive funny analogies on the pitfalls of it all comedian Doug Thompson is a ray of light. He became an opening act for "The Impractical Jokers" from Tru Tv hit show and has never look

programme.title: Richard Sarvate
programme.desc: Richard Sarvate quit his ten year programming career in Silicon Valley to be a stand up comedian. Oops! Now he spends his nights poking fun at tech jobs.

programme.title: Orlando Baxter
programme.desc: Orlando Baxter's fresh perspective and unique relatability makes this former high school teacher a fan favorite all over the world. In 2016, Orlando made his late night TV debut on the Conan show on TBS, and since then he's appeared on the television shows "Comedy Up Late" in Australia, B.E.T.'s "50 Central" and Laff Mobb's Laff Track on Tru TV.

programme.title: Jeff Shaw
programme.desc: Jeff Shaw's writing is marked both by idealism and humanity. His stimulating satire is often infused with poetic beauty. More importantly, he looks like Rod Stewart.

programme.title: Gotham Comedy Live
programme.desc: Don't miss Chris Kattan as he hosts an all-new hour of stand-up live from New York's Gotham Comedy Club. Kattan is joined by four of America's funniest up-and-coming comedians including Adrian Minkowicz, Cort McCown and Aida Rodriguez.

programme.title: Gotham Comedy Live
programme.desc: Darrell Hammond will have you rolling when he takes the stage for an hour of standup at New York's Gotham Comedy Club. Don't miss this rare chance to see one of the world's greatest comics along with four of America's rising stand-up stars.

programme.title: Gotham Comedy Live
programme.desc: Don't miss Anjelah Johnson, aka Bon Qui Qui, for a hilarious hour of comedy. See why nearly 100 million YouTube fans have fallen in love as she performs with Jim Mendrinos, Luis J Gomez, Nick Vatterott and Wil Sylvince.

programme.title: Gotham Comedy Live
programme.desc: With his spot-on versions of everyone, "Saturday Night Live" cast member and impressionist Jay Pharoah will have you laughing out loud from New York's Gotham Comedy Club. AJ Foster, Kelsey Cook, Mike Paramore and Neko White also perform!

programme.title: Gotham Comedy Live
programme.desc: Don't miss this chance to see the brilliant comic and "Larry Sanders Show" star Mary Lynn Rajskub along with four of America's funniest up-and-coming comedians live from New York's legendary Gotham Comedy Club.

programme.title: Gotham Comedy Live
programme.desc: Get ready for a night of huge laughs with Michelle Collins ("The View") along with Travis Howze, John Bush and more. It's an hour of non-stop laugh-out-loud live and uncensored stand-up from New York's one and only Gotham Comedy Club.

programme.title: Billion Dollar Babie by Tara Electra
programme.desc: Welcome to Billion Dollar Babie, the TV show and YouTube series designed to help you create YOUR billion-dollar life! This mind-shifting new show is hosted by serial entrepreneur Tara Electra, the CEO and Co-Founder of Unruly Agency, a full-scale agency specializing in social media management, influencer marketing, content creation, and more. But this isn't your standard entrepreneurial TV series—Tara is getting into bed (literally) with entrepreneurs, thought leaders, and top content creators who have carved their own paths and achieved life-changing success by being uniquely themselves. Every person has their own billion-dollar qualities, but it's hard to unlock them without a little guidance.

programme.title: Bitten by Giant Soldier Ants!

programme.title: Bitten by 3 Toxic Worms! (Which Is Worst?)
programme.desc: Three worms, three different toxins. Coyote compares the effects of each to determine which toxic worm inflicts the worst bite of all.Cold-stunned sea turtles wash ashore, helpless. Mark joins a rescue effort to revive and release these beautiful reptiles back to the ocean.

programme.title: Venomous Sewer Snake Found in Bangkok!
programme.desc: Urban exploration gets wild when Mark finds a rare venomous snake deep in the sewer systems of Bangkok.This insect doesn't bite—it sprays acid! Mark discovers a rare bug with an unbelievable defense mechanism aimed right at the eyes.

programme.title: Stung by an Electric Caterpillar!
programme.desc: This episode features a painful sting from the electric caterpillar, a bizarre jungle dweller with venomous barbs. It's shocking—literally.A sting from Japan's meanest wasp! This aggressive insect doesn't hold back. Mark's reaction is both painful and fascinating.

programme.title: Burned by a Giant Fireworm!
programme.desc: The giant fireworm brings the burn—literally. Mark handles this bizarre sea creature and ends up with chemical irritation on his skin.Coyote explores a lost island, teeming with mystery. From rare creatures to haunting terrain, this wild place holds unexpected surprises.

programme.title: You Won't Believe This Sailfish Catch!
programme.desc: Coyote reels in a record-breaking sailfish and takes viewers on a high-seas journey filled with education, adrenaline, and ocean conservation.Looks can be deceiving. Dumb cane, a common plant, releases chemicals that scorch skin. Coyote finds out the hard way.

programme.title: Prehistoric Creature Found Alive! (Trilobite Beetle)
programme.desc: It looks like something from another era—and it is! Mark discovers a trilobite beetle, a living relic that predates the dinosaurs.This giant black bee is more than just big—it's aggressive. Mark takes the sting and shows why it's one of the most feared pollinators.

programme.title: Did I Find a Murder Hornet in the USA?!
programme.desc: Could murder hornets be in the U.S.? Coyote investigates sightings and explains how to identify these massive, invasive insects.This ancient fish has long, needle-like teeth and a monstrous look. Coyote dives into its evolutionary history and predatory tactics.

programme.title: Frog Scavenger Hunt! – Can I Catch Them All?
programme.desc: How many frog species can Coyote catch in one day? This scavenger hunt is a race against time and terrain across wetlands and forests.Costa Rica's most dangerous pit viper is milked for venom in this nerve-racking episode. Coyote shows the precision it takes to stay safe.

programme.title: Deadly Bite!? Blue Ring Octopus
programme.desc: Bright, beautiful, and deadly—the blue ring octopus carries venom strong enough to kill. Mark gets close to show what to look out for.A simple photo turns into a full-on wilderness blooper reel. Mark's attempt at the perfect selfie gets out of hand—literally.

programme.title: Diving with a Jetpack!
programme.desc: This emotional episode follows chimpanzees rescued from testing labs as they adapt to new lives of freedom and care.Coyote tests an underwater jetpack, soaring through the ocean and meeting sea life in this high-speed dive adventure you have to see to believe!

programme.title: Don't Touch! – Up Close with a Rattlesnake!

programme.title: Sucked by Tiger Leeches!
programme.desc: Leeches attack in this jungle trek! Mark shows how tiger leeches feed and what it takes to remove them once they latch on.In the aftermath of wildfires, koalas need help. Coyote joins a rescue team in Australia to treat, care for, and rehome injured marsupials.

programme.title: Stung by a Tarantula Hawk Countless Times! – Glinda Approved

Coyote puts his head in a box full of live spiders. The volcano ant is here—and it bites hard! Coyote counts down 10 facts about this intense species.

programme.desc: Join Blippi and Meekah for some flags, raptors, and dancing! One team wins a Discovery Cube prize!

programme.title: Blippi
programme.sub-title: Blippi Learns about wheels and Fire Trucks
programme.desc: Blippi joins up with a roller derby team to master the basics, and most of all… play!

programme.title: Blippi
programme.desc: Blippi visits Citizens Bank Park in Philadelphia, PA to learn about baseball and meets the mascot!

programme.title: Blippi
programme.desc: Blippi explores the world of Penguins, teaching children about their habitat, diet, how to take care of them and much more!

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Sharing the joys and traditions of the holiday season with your little one is truly one of the greatest gifts of parenthood, and Baby Santa's Music Box makes this magical time even more special! Celebrate by treating your baby and yourself to a captivating wonderland of bright lights, sparkling ornaments, sleigh bells, toys, winter scenes, jolly Santas and more -- all accompanied by beloved holiday melodies.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Every stage is an exciting adventure with your newborn. As babies grow, they absorb a wide variety of sights and sounds. And with so much to see and hear, infants seem to enjoy, and be most soothed by, gentle sounds such as your voice or pleasant, restful music. Treat your child -- and yourself -- to the delights of Baby Bach Musical Adventure, an award-winning program that exposes babies to the joy and majesty of classical music while presenting them with stimulating, colorful images.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby Wordsworth: First Words Around the House
programme.desc: As their communication skills continue to develop, little ones begin to recognize common words and may point to objects or pictures when these items are named. Baby Wordsworth playfully taps into your little one's natural curiosity and introduces 30 words from around the home -- both spoken and in sign language. This engaging program presents little ones with familiar objects in the kitchen, playroom, yard and more -- from the living room window to their favorite teddy bear.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Cal, Neptune, Opus, Dean, Tinker and others learn about the flora and fauna of the ocean through STEAM-based principles and real-life footage.

programme.title: The Sandbox
programme.desc: The Sandbox is where our favorite Baby Einstein characters gather to play, problem-solve and have fun. Each five-minute episode explores an area of curiosity relevant to our 2-4 year old audience. Since the four weathered planks of wood that make up the structure of their sandbox are no obstacles for their imaginations, the entire universe is available to them for each new adventure.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Set off on a fun-filled "field trip" with your baby to discover animals found at the park, on the farm, and in your own backyard.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Take your little explorer on an exotic musical expedition to meet wild animals from across the globe. Journey to the jungle, savannah, desert and forest.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Learn about the numbers 1,2,3,4 & 5 through rhyme, real-life footage, counting, stories, and repetition - accompanied by classical music and real world imagery.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: At 12 months, babies can identify specific sounds, and they re also starting to match the sounds they hear with the objects that make them. Meet the Orchestra -- First Instruments presents your little "maestro" with a playful introduction to the sights and sounds of a real orchestra -- from the clashing of cymbals to the purring of the cello and everything in between!

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: As each day passes, babies' awareness of the world around them -- and all the wonders it holds -- continues to develop. Wild animals are especially intriguing and World Animals captures the spirtit of little ones' fascination with wild creatures as it introduces them to animals living in the jungle, in the ocean, and on the savannah.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Cherry Jam is so enjoying staying in Berry Bitty City, that she calls her managers in Big Bitty City and informs them that she is going to stay for a much needed vacation! Strawberry and the girls are thrilled that she will be with them for a little longer, and they do all they can to make their guest comfortable. But Cherry doesn't want to be treated like a guest she wants to fit in and contribute to the community.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Plum decides to hold a dance recital at Strawberry's Café Cabaret stage and sends out a stack of invitations. She forgets, however, to check the sign-up sheet at the Café and schedules it for the same night as Blueberry is scheduled to read to the baby Berrykins. Strawberry tells Plum she cannot hold the recital in the Café on her chosen day because the Café is booked.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Raspberry is discovered by a talent scout who wants her to move to Berry Big City and design a new line of Glitter fashions! She will be provided with her own studio, staff, publicity, commitments from big department stores-everything she needs to be a big fashion designing star! All her friends are thrilled for her. Only Cherry is a bit less enthusiastic about Raspberry's stardom, which Raspberry mistakenly interprets as jealousy.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's the last week of summer and Berry Bitty City is hopping with activity as the girls prepare for their tropical island vacation at Berry Breezy Bay Resort. But just as they're about to leave, bad news: the resort is closed for the season due to berry breezy weather. The girls are disappointed, but Orange isn't giving up. She says if they can't go to the tropical island, maybe they can bring the tropical island here!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: With only a few days of summer left, the girls are about to enjoy their first vacation in their newly-created, tropical beach resort at Berry Bitty Lake, when who should descend upon them but Mavis Maraschino, the comically over-the-top "Entertainment Tonight"-style show host. Mavis has dumped her focus on fashions in favor of an even glitzier show called Lifestyles of the Berry Big Bitty Stars, and she wants her first segment to be about how pop superstar Cherry Jam spends her vacation.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: On a beautiful winter's night, Blueberry reads the Baby Berrykins a story of what happened one winter in Berry Bitty City-a winter that almost wasn't. Just as everyone is ready for winter fun and fashions, a sudden warming melts the snow and ruins their plans. Improvising with snowmen made of shaved ice and cotton puffs, Strawberry and her friends play "Capture the Snowman's Carrot Nose." The Berrykins want to join in the fun, so the girls play against them, with Strawberry refereeing.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's another windy winter day, and the postal bees are staying indoors-the wind is too strong for their berry bitty wings. "We don't know when the next mail will get through!" It's bad news for Blueberry, who has been anxiously awaiting the next installment of a Patty Persimmon Detective story. If only she could get to the post office in Berry Bitty Dale where her package is waiting!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It appears winter is finally coming to an end and Raspberry is planning a big fashion show to display her spring line. Her vision is to have the girls model her fashions in a parade past the town fountain. What she didn't realize is that the Berrykins are turning the fountain into a big water show. Every time the girls come to rehearse, they must comically dodge jets of fruit juice from the out-of-control fountain-the Berrykins are still working out the bugs.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry, Cherry and the girls form a new band, Strawberry and the Sweet Beats, and prepare to go on the road to perform at the Opening Ceremony of the Berry Big City Games! While master mechanic Berrykin Bruce turns Cherry's tour bus into the band's hotel-on-wheels, Strawberry and her friends pack for the big trip. But the rest of Berry Bitty City points out that someone needs to run the girls' businesses while they are gone.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Berrykins Ed and Earl report to Princess Berrykin and Strawberry that they are certain there is a monster in the berry patch! They saw something with many noses and many tails making weird noises in the bushes. But upon further investigation by Strawberry and her friends, it is discovered that friendly boy Huckleberry Pie was driving his pet-mobile of orphan dogs through the countryside, took a wrong turn and got stuck near Berry Bitty City.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: While enjoying lunch in the café, the girls are interrupted by some music coming from the gazebo. They head outside and find Sadiebug and Kadiebug wearing badges and standing by a banner and podium. A group of chairs are set up in front of them. The twins begin to announce, and then argue, that they are starting a club - a good citizens club. The girls are shocked as the twins argue with each other all the time.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's time again for the Dance-Off between the Big Bitty City Dance Team and the Berry Bitty City Dancers. Plum is stressed out and frazzled because she desperately wants to win. And the Big Bitty City Dancers are a force to be reckoned with. They are elegant and beautifully synchronized. Plum shows the girls a maze of dance steps that she's choreographed in the hopes of creating a winning piece. The problem is, the contest is only 1 week away!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Cherry Jam is so enjoying staying in Berry Bitty City, that she calls her managers in Big Bitty City and informs them that she is going to stay for a much needed vacation! Strawberry and the girls are thrilled that she will be with them for a little longer, and they do all they can to make their guest comfortable. But Cherry doesn't want to be treated like a guest she wants to fit in and contribute to the community.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Plum decides to hold a dance recital at Strawberry's Café Cabaret stage and sends out a stack of invitations. She forgets, however, to check the sign-up sheet at the Café and schedules it for the same night as Blueberry is scheduled to read to the baby Berrykins. Strawberry tells Plum she cannot hold the recital in the Café on her chosen day because the Café is booked.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Blueberry is disappointed in the girls' lack of enthusiasm for the Patti Persimmon mystery novels, her favorite book series. She finds herself missing the company of her fellow Persimmon fan Huckleberry, and thinks up a great way to get him to visit. She invites Huck to co-write a story with her to submit to an online mystery magazine.. Huck eagerly accepts and comes for a visit.

programme.title: LEGO Marvel Super Heroes: Avengers Reassembled
programme.desc: The Avengers prepare for a party with a surprise guest when Ultron crashes the preparations by using mind control on Iron Man. While trying to rescue their leader, the rest of the team discovers that Baron Stucker, HYDRA, and Yellowjacket are in on Ultron's plans. While preparing for a party at Avengers' Tower, THE AVENGERS (IRON MAN, CAPTAIN AMERICA, BLACK WIDOW, HAWKEYE, THOR, HULK and VISION) notice Iron Man acting strangely. When Iron Man volunteers to go out and get more ice, they find it odd: when has Tony every volunteered to get anything? Suddenly, ULTRON appears on a screen: he's taken control of Iron Man! To make matters worse, Ultron takes over all the versions of Iron Man's armor and they fly off! Finally, the Avengers confront Ultron and his Ultron Minions as they attack Avengers' Tower. Ultron's ultimate plan: use all the data/stuff they've stolen to free the newly rebuilt IRON LEGION, destroy the Avengers, and control the world. Tony dons the hastily repaired Hulk Buster Armor and it's on! It's a huge battle as the Avengers try to save their beloved HQ and defeat Ultron. Will they succeed? And, more importantly, can their party be saved after Ultron tries to take down their Tower?The Avengers must now fight one of their own, and they're not sure what to do! Cap and Thor lead the charge, but can't fend off Iron Man and Ultron's Minions. Meanwhile, Black Widow, Hawkeye and Hulk track down a signal that seems to be controlling Iron Man from a castle in the “Little Sokovia” section of New York. There they fight HYDRA and BARON VON STRUCKER and learn that YELLOWJACKET is the “bug” that infected Iron Man's suit for Ultron. To help break Iron Man free from Ultron's control, the Avengers call in their own bug...ANT MAN!

programme.title: The Power Of Merlok
programme.desc: When Jestro attacks a village on the far side of the Kingdom, the NEXO-Knights wonder how they'll get there. Then Macy remembers her dad has a royal RV…maybe they can “mod” that for their own, “knightly” use? Now the NEXO-Knights get rolling…in THE FORTREX, their own ROLLING CASTLE! This great new HQ, which houses Merlok 2.0 as an operating system, will be how the knights move around Knighton and protect it from Jestro and his monsters. Speaking of the evil jester, in this episode Jestro uses some newly-made monsters to attack a town far from the capitol where he thinks he's safe from the Knights' reach. We see two parallel stories here: the Knights training, learning more about digital magic and getting organized as a team and at the same time we see Jestro making monsters, trying to learn how his powers work and talking to the Book. In the end, the Knights roll up in their castle and defeat Jestro and his marauding monsters. Lance thinks he should be the leader because he's a snot. “Of course I'm the leader…I'm a Richmond.”

programme.title: The Warrior Within
programme.desc: Cragger tricks Laval into withholding CHI from the Crocodile tribe. This reignites the hostilities between the Lions and Crocodiles. Laval must frantically escape the wrath of the Crocs and somehow get rid of the CHI before his father finds out.

programme.title: The Hybrid Horror!
programme.desc: A terrified hybrid dinosaur rampages through the park, causing chaos and creating cover for Danny and Sinjin as they try to steal the Nedry videotape.

programme.title: The Snowball Effect
programme.desc: Laval and Li'Ella's relationship grows as he gives her a tour of the Lion City. But distracted, he misses a key battle against the Hunters. Tormak joins the fight and saves the day. But the Lion King Lagravis is captured and brought to the Ice Fort. Who will lead the Lions now?!?

programme.title: The Spectral Lands
programme.desc: Arin ventures into a dangerous new land to heal Ras while Nya and Kai come up with a plan to make Jay come to them.

programme.desc: Dance, sing, and learn with Blippi like you've never seen him before and special guest Meekah. Shout out your favorite vehicles, shake out all the wiggles, and OJ Twist your way through this brand-new musical party!

programme.title: Blippi's Big Dino Adventure
programme.desc: Get ready for a fun-filled journey as they search for hidden dinosaur eggs, explore exciting dino habitats, and learn all about different dinosaur species. Along the way, they'll discover fascinating facts, solve puzzles, and have plenty of hands-on fun!

programme.title: On the Road
programme.desc: Strawberry, Cherry and the girls form a new band, Strawberry and the Sweet Beats, and prepare to go on the road to perform at the Opening Ceremony of the Berry Big City Games! While master mechanic Berrykin Bruce turns Cherry's tour bus into the band's hotel-on-wheels, Strawberry and her friends pack for the big trip. But the rest of Berry Bitty City points out that someone needs to run the girls' businesses while they are gone. Strawberry and her friends give the Berrykins a crash course in city-sitting.

programme.title: HappyKids
programme.desc: HappyKids

programme.title: A Boy and His Dogs
programme.desc: Berrykins Ed and Earl report to Princess Berrykin and Strawberry that they are certain there is a monster in the berry patch! They saw something with many noses and many tails making weird noises in the bushes. But upon further investigation by Strawberry and her friends, it is discovered that friendly boy Huckleberry Pie was driving his pet-mobile of orphan dogs through the countryside, took a wrong turn and got stuck near Berry Bitty City. What the Berrykins mistook for a monster was really the bunch of cute pups Huck has been trying to get adopted. While Huck's van is being repaired, Strawberry invites Huck and his seven pups to spend the night in the new bedroom above the marketplace, while she bunks in her old bedroom above the café. The next morning, Strawberry discovers that the playful pups have given her bedroom a total makeover –the wrong kind. An embarrassed Huck insists on staying until he can repair the damage.

programme.title: Sid's Holiday Adventure!
programme.desc: But this year, Sid and his family are visiting relatives where it's chilly and cold. Sid wonders why it can't be warm everywhere? At school, Sid discovers that temperatures are different all over the world!

programme.title: The Wind Did It!
programme.desc: At school, Sid and his friends discover that wind is strong enough to make sand dunes, waves, move sail boats, and even blow away a pile of leaves!

programme.title: Sky's the Limit
programme.desc: When a storm causes a giant boulder to cut off Berry Bitty City's water supply, Strawberry and the girls face the possibility of having to move away from their homes. With the help of Mr. Longface Caterpillar, the girls set out on an adventure to save their town.

programme.title: Blippi's Winter Olympics 2022
programme.desc: The Olympics are back! Blippi and Meekah want to learn all about winter sports.

programme.title: Partners in Crime
programme.desc: Blueberry is disappointed in the girls' lack of enthusiasm for the Patti Persimmon mystery novels, her favorite book series. She finds herself missing the company of her fellow Persimmon fan Huckleberry, and thinks up a great way to get him to visit. She invites Huck to co-write a story with her to submit to an online mystery magazine.. Huck eagerly accepts and comes for a visit. He is especially hopeful that if the story is accepted, he can raise some funds for his new Huckleberry's Hotel for Homeless Pets.

programme.title: The Mystery of the Disappearing Dog Show
programme.desc: When Huckleberry and Blueberry's Patti Persimmon-style mystery story is rejected by an online mystery magazine, Blueberry and Huck have to come up with a new way to raise support for Huckleberry's Hotel for Homeless Pets back in Berry Big City. Strawberry suggests they hold a big dog show! Plum makes over-ambitious plans to display talents that her dog does not quite have, trying to teach him complicated dance routines. When everyone learns what awesome feats Plum has planned for her own dog, the competition heats up, everyone wanting their pup to perform in an even more spectacular manner. The training sessions go comically awry, with morale starting to plummet.

programme.title: Down for the Count
programme.desc: Despite taking huge amounts of damage, Go Onizuka keeps fighting and Link Summons his ace monster: Gouki the Great Ogre. Driving Playmaker into a tough corner, he aims to fight back against his strong opponent.

programme.title: Count Basie
programme.desc: The North Sea Jazz Festival is the largest indoor music festival in the world, known globally as the event where the past, present and future of jazz are featured within three days. Next to a firm base of jazz as the festival's staple music genre, many others, such as blues, soul, funk, or hip hop, pass by. In 1979, legendary big band leader and pianist Count Basie brought his famous big band to the North Sea Jazz Festival in The Hague to perform two sets. Basie, whose minimalist pianism and blues-oriented swing style had cemented his popularity as early as the 1930s, was in the midst of a European tour and had recorded his live album On the Road the previous night in Montreux, Switzerland. Here is the first of two sets recorded at the festival in 1979.

programme.title: Miles Davis
programme.desc: American trumpeter Miles Davis (1926-1991) was a pioneering jazz musician from the late 1940s to the late 1980s. His influence on 20th century music is hard to overstate, as he trailblazed bebop, cool jazz, hardbop, modal jazz, and electronic music. On October 11, 1964, Miles Davis performed at Teatro Dell'Arte in Milan. With tenor saxophonist Wayne Shorter, pianist Herbie Hancock, bassist Ron Carter and drummer Tony Williams, Davis performed Autumn Leaves, My Funny Valentine, All Blues, All of You, and Joshua.

programme.title: Alex Dee
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Count Basie
programme.desc: The North Sea Jazz Festival is the largest indoor music festival in the world, known globally as the event where the past, present and future of jazz are featured within three days. Next to a firm base of jazz as the festival's staple music genre, many others, such as blues, soul, funk, or hip hop, pass by. In 1979, legendary big band leader and pianist Count Basie brought his famous big band to the North Sea Jazz Festival in The Hague to perform two sets. Basie, whose minimalist pianism and blues-oriented swing style had cemented his popularity as early as the 1930s, was in the midst of a European tour and had recorded his live album 'On the Road' the previous night in Montreux, Switzerland. Here is the second of two sets recorded at the festival in 1979.

programme.title: Wes Montgomery, Pim Jacobs, Ruud Jacobs & Han Bennink
programme.sub-title: Guitarlegend Wes Montgomery in The Netherlands
programme.desc: Wes Montgomery: Live in '65 shines a light on one of the most unique and influential guitarists in music history. These beautifully filmed programs from the spring of 1965 feature Wes, in intimate studio settings, leading three different lineups through some of his best-known tunes, including “Four On Six”, “Jingles”, and “West Coast Blues”. This rare footage, featuring rehearsals, between-song banter, and closeup camera angles, illuminates Wes's extraordinary musical vocabulary and unconventional picking technique.

programme.title: Thelonious Monk
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Michael Blicher
programme.sub-title: Blicher Hemmer Gadd - A Music documentary
programme.desc: Award-winning saxophonist Michael Blicher, Hammond wizard Dan Hemmer and legendary drummer Steve Gadd joined forces in 2014 to celebrate their shared love for Hammond-organ soul jazz. The band, which tours extensively throughout the world, has released several albums. Their third album, which was released in November 2019, features U.K. vocalist Paul Carrack on the soulful ballad 'The First One To Know'.

programme.title: Kenny Barron
programme.desc: Pianist Kenny Barron's June 27, 2019 appearance at the Alfa Jazz Festival in Ukraine's Lviv was a celebration of sublime jazz virtuosity. The revered elder statesmen of jazz piano brought his regular working trio of Kiyoshi Kitagawa (bass) and Jonathan Blake (drums), augmented by stellar jazzman Marcus Strickland (tenor saxophone) and young lion Riley Mulherkar (trumpet). Their seamless blend of classic bebop and modern explorations spoke of a deep, emotive connection to each note, captivating the Ukrainian audience with lyrical improvisations during this unforgettable concert.

programme.title: Antonio Faraò
programme.desc: Antonio Faraò features prominently in the rich group of talented Italian pianists. He is the winner of the 1998 prestigious Concours Martial Solal, awarded by Herbie Hancock, and he has made his mark as a player of elegance and lyricism. This has allowed him to collaborate with the best European and American musicians. In his album ‘Evan', recorded in the USA, he leads an all-star band, notably starring Joe Lovano on tenor. In this particular recording at Jazz à Ramatuelle, he appears at the Theatre de Verdure in the company of another sax legend - Dave Liebman, a musician of unfailing generosity and himself the repository of more than 40 years of modern jazz history. With refined ballads and feline groove, this meeting sparkles, perhaps even lighting up some new stars in the night above Ramatuelle.

programme.title: Christian Zacharias, Orchestre National de Lille & Isabelle van Keulen
programme.sub-title: Schumann - Violin Concerto and Symphony No. 1
programme.desc: German conductor Christian Zacharias leads the Orchestre national de Lille in a concert program dedicated to Robert Schumann. The concert opens with the ‘Genoveva' Overture, Op. 81. Although Schumann's only opera Genoveva is not often performed, its overture established itself as an autonomous work in concert halls. After, the composer's Violin Concerto in D minor, WoO 23, is performed, featuring Dutch violinist Isabelle van Keulen as the soloist. Written in 1853, it is Schumann's only violin concerto. The concert ends with a performance of Schumann's Symphony No. 1 in B-flat major, Op. 38, also known as the ‘Spring Symphony'. This optimistic work is written in 1841 and is the most performed of Schumann's four symphonies. This concert was recorded at Auditorium du Nouveau Siècle in Lille, France, on June 16, 2017.

programme.title: Philippe Jordan, Orchestre de l'Opéra national de Paris, Choeur de l'Opéra national de Paris & Ricarda Merbeth
programme.sub-title: Beethoven - Symphony No. 9 in D minor, Op. 125
programme.desc: Swiss conductor Philippe Jordan and the Orchestre de l'Opéra national de Paris recorded all of Ludwig van Beethoven's symphonies in 2014-2015. In this program, maestro Jordan presents Beethoven's final symphony: Symphony No. 9 in D minor, Op. 125. He conducts the Orchestre and Choeurs de l'Opéra national de Paris and four vocal soloists Ricarda Merbeth (soprano), Daniela Sindram (mezzosoprano), Robert Dean Smith (tenor), and Günther Groissböck (bass). Beethoven composed his last Symphony when his hearing had all but gone, between 1822 and 1824. Symphony No. 9 is the longest and most ambitious of Beethoven's symphonies. Most striking is the piece's finale movement, which includes a choir and four vocal soloists singing a setting of Friedrich Schiller's poem ‘An die Freude' (Ode to Joy). This performance was recorded at Opéra Bastille in Paris, France, in 2015.

programme.title: Carlos Miguel Prieto & Orquesta Sinfónica de Minería
programme.desc: Mahler's Symphony No. 6 is a monumental work exploring deep personal tragedy, incorporating a unique, famous "hammer" blows that symbolize the inevitable blows of fate. This symphony's intense emotional power, epic scope, and the composer's eventual wrestling with fate and personal loss make it an unforgettable, profoundly moving experience for audiences.

programme.title: Thomas Dunford
programme.sub-title: Works for lute by J. S. Bach
programme.desc: French lutenist Thomas Dunford performs various works for lute by J. S. Bach in this intimate chamber music concert, recorded at Concertgebouw Brugge, Belgium, in 2017. On the program are Suite for lute in G minor, BWV 995 Suite for solo cello in G major (arr. for lute), BWV 1007 and Chaconne from Partita for solo violin in D minor (arr. lute), BWV 1004. Paris-born lutenist Thomas Dunford (*1988) discovered the lute at the age of nine. He studied at the Conservatory of Paris and the Schola Cantorum in Basel, and participated in masterclasses with lutenists such as Rolf Lislevand and Julian Bream. He has made various solo and ensemble appearances at Europe's most prestigious festivals.

programme.title: Pavel Milyukov & Boris Berezovsky
programme.sub-title: Works for violin by Franck, Fauré, Schubert a.o.
programme.desc: Russian violinist Pavel Milyukov and pianist Boris Berezovsky join forces in this concert recorded at Tchaikovsky Concert Hall in Moscow, Russia, on October 15, 2020. Milyukov has won prizes at various international competitions and has appeared at venues throughout Europe. He forms an excellent chamber music duo with acclaimed pianist Boris Berezovsky. On this concert's program are César Franck's Sonata for violin and piano Gabriel Fauré's Après un rêve Alfred Schnittke's Stille Nacht and Franz Schubert's Erlkönig. As an encore, the duo performs ‘Russian Song' from Igor Stravinsky's opera Mavra (arranged by S. Dushkin).

programme.title: J Balvin
programme.desc: J. Balvin returns to his hometown of Medellín, Colombia to perform a special anniversary concert entitled "BRUUTTAL". A musical journey that begins with his early songs and ends with his most recent, multi-platinum album, " Energía.” This spectacular show was performed and filmed to express J. Balvin's gratitude to his fans. J. Balvin succeeded in making this one-time show spectacular by assembling other Latin urban music legends including Nicky Jam, Yandel, Farruko, Zion y Lennox, Jowell y Randy, among others, to join him on stage. J. Balvin sang his hit songs “6 AM,” “Safari,” “Ginza,” and “Ay Vamos.”

programme.title: Journey
programme.desc: On March 14, 2009, Journey returned to Arnel Pineda's homeland and introduced him as their newest lead singer to a crowd of nearly 30,000 at the SM Mall of Asia Concert Grounds. Features songs such as Don't Stop Believin', Stone In Love, When You Love A Woman and Separate Ways.

This is how on September 26, 2014 he was invited to participate in one of the UK's most popular festivals, the iTunes Festival, giving his audience a great concert at the Roundhouse of London.
